flag_definitions.meaning: Observed in A25 daily discharge rows but not defined by the attached CDEC FlagList table

no_data_policy.a25_observed_unlisted_flag: X on -9999 A25 power-generation discharge rows; exclude until CDEC or station metadata defines it.
no_data_policy.required_followup: Find or request an official CDEC no-data sentinel definition before promoted automation treats -9999 as universal across all sensors/durations.

promotion_gate: CDEC CBR remains the primary modern South Fork flow/stage candidate, and flags/terms are recorded for the first CBR pull plus the 30-day CBR/A25 context window. Do not retune presets or photoreal water bands until broader representative CBR/A25 windows, A25 flag/routing interpretation, release context, legal/redistribution signoff, hydrologic station-to-rapid relation, and guide review are complete.
purpose: Record the CDEC/DWR terms, data flag definitions, no-data treatment, and CBR/A25 station interpretation needed before South Fork flow windows can influence visual or gameplay flow bands.

retrieval_review.a25_followup_probe: The 2026-06-07 to 2026-07-06 A25 daily power-generation discharge window introduced X flags on -9999 rows; X was not present in the attached CDEC FlagList table and is treated as exclude/hold-for-review.
retrieval_review.api_docs_probe: Official CDEC API PDFs were fetched; each pointed to the FlagList report endpoint for data flag definitions.
retrieval_review.conditions_page_local_probe: DWR Conditions of Use page fetched successfully and reviewed for reliability/no-guarantee language.
retrieval_review.flag_list_probe: The old /misc/flaglist.html URL returned 404; the current CDEC reportapp FlagList endpoint returned the data flag table.

a25.name: CHILI BAR POWERHOUSE
a25.not_accepted_yet: sole authority for raftable river flow at downstream features

cbr.name: AMERICAN RIVER AT CHILI BAR
cbr.not_accepted_yet: direct gameplay or photoreal flow-band authority
cbr.role: primary modern flow/stage candidate for South Fork Chili Bar review

remaining_review_needed: Hydrologic routing/lag from CBR/A25 to each authored rapid and recovery pool.
Guide/outfitter validation of low, commercial, high, too-low, and washout conditions.
Comparison against broader CBR event/hourly windows and historical USGS 11445500 context.
Explicit review of how each promoted band changes holes, exposed rocks, shelves, wave trains, eddies, boulder damping, and rescue visibility.

conditions_of_use_summary: DWR publishes web information for convenient immediate access.
DWR says human or mechanical error remains possible and does not guarantee accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or sequencing.
Derived gameplay or visual bands must preserve source attribution, retrieval metadata, caveats, and a separate review status.
terms_summary.provider: California Data Exchange Center / California Department of Water Resources
repository_policy: Do not promote CDEC-derived flow bands without itemized station, sensor, time-window, units, flag, and retrieval provenance.
Do not present CDEC values as authoritative gameplay truth without guide review and release-context interpretation.
Do not package third-party reference media from CDEC pages; store links and derived metadata only unless rights are explicit.
